top_signals.title: Microsoft plans to improve Windows 11 driver quality in 2026
top_signals.summary: Microsoft plans to raise the quality bar of Windows 11 drivers, as drivers "sit at the heart of every Windows experience" and connect the OS to the "silicon, components, and peripherals." [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
